---
#title: "people"
listing:
  contents: people
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: 
    categories: [R, Quarto]
  fields: [image, title, description, subtitle]

page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
# knitr:
#   opts_chunk: 
#     collapse: true
execute: 
  echo: false
---
![](images/team.png){.profile-pic fig-alt="TODO" fig-align="center" width="33%"}

 
# [PEOPLE]{.second-color}
Our multidisciplinary team is made of Data Science teachers from across the university (Medicine, Psychology, Business and Math). Teaching career changers is our main focus, as we explore how Data can transform Health as it is anchored the social and economical realities of the world.
